scripts.newpost:
node -e "const d=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];const f='content/blog/'+d+'.md';if(require('fs').existsSync(f)){console.warn('Warning: '+f+' already exists, skipping.');process.exit(1);}require('fs').writeFileSync(f,'---
title: Untitled
date: '+d+'
published: false
---
');console.log('Created',f);"
